verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In the middle of the darkness When I'm looking hard for hope When I'm drifting toward the rocks of fear Afraid that I'm alone When I can't see beyond today I'm sure of what is true I turn my hearts in silent prayer To all I know of you

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Still you are the faithful father Timeless is your loving plan Still you are the place of shelter In this lost and barren land Still you are the God of heaven Forever in your hand You revealed yourself to be the Great I am And still you are (the great I am)

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I can never understand it How your love remains the same In a world that's full of restless hearts In a constant state of change You've proven that you're worthy Of the trust I place in you You've been through all the ages past The only source of truth

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Still you are… Still you are…
